rationale: The citing note says Study 2 explicitly replicates prior findings from “Zhu, Chen, and Dasgupta (2008)” and then tests when that pattern reverses, which indicates direct empirical engagement with this specific 2008 JMR paper (DOI-matched). It also positions its contribution as extending prior partitioned-price research to trade-ins, making the cited paper a likely theory/mechanism benchmark rather than a passing mention.
